concerns.text: FR-001 requires extracting 'move entropy' (Shannon entropy of legal move distributions). Task T006 (parser) is marked [ ] (incomplete) and T005 (entropy) is marked [ ] (incomplete). No task exists to generate the required `metrics_with_moves.csv` or `edge_case_warnings.log` artifacts, leaving the core data pipeline for FR-001 and FR-002 unimplemented.

FR-006 requires a proxy validation test on a hold-out set of at least 20 trajectories. Task T014a (splitter) is marked [ ] (incomplete) and T007b (static proxy) is marked [ ] (incomplete). Without these, the `validation_set.csv` and `static_log_proxy.json` artifacts cannot be generated, making the mandatory gate before training (T009) impossible to execute.

FR-004 requires re-simulation of the test set for Dynamic, Static, and Random baselines. Task T017 (Dynamic Execution) is marked [ ] (incomplete), T020 (Random Baseline) is marked [ ] (incomplete), and T022 (Aggregation) is marked [ ] (incomplete). The primary hypothesis test (US-1/US-2) cannot be performed without these execution artifacts.

SC-001 and SC-003 require statistical significance reporting (McNemar's/Bonferroni). Task T028 (Final Report) is marked [ ] (incomplete) and depends on T022a (Token Reduction Gate), which is also marked [ ] (incomplete). The success criteria cannot be measured or verified.

FR-002 requires training a lightweight classifier. Task T009 is marked [X] (complete) in the text, but its dependencies (T014, T008c, T008) are marked [ ] (incomplete). The task cannot be executed as described because the required input artifacts (`proxy_validation_report.json`, `fallback_flag.json`) do not exist.

Task T005 is marked [ ] (incomplete) but the description includes specific implementation logic for NaN/Inf handling. The task status contradicts the presence of detailed logic, suggesting the task was drafted but not executed. This creates ambiguity in the 'tasked' stage where tasks should be actionable.

Task T023 is listed twice with different IDs and purposes. First as 'Unit test for McNemar's test' (T023, Phase 4 Tests) and second as 'Implement verification logic to calculate token reduction consistency' (T023, Phase 3 Implementation). This ID collision prevents clear traceability to SC-004.
